title: ilex pallida
intro: Ilex pallida, also known as the pale-leaf holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ilex pallida include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and support for the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ilex pallida include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
